title: MODY6 (NEUROD1) diabetes with prior type 2 phenotype and pacemaker
description: A 48-year-old man with type 2 diabetes since age 25 and dilated cardiomyopathy (pacemaker at 42) presents for diabetes follow-up. Genetic testing confirmed MODY6 (NEUROD1 p.Met114Leu). Case covers all six workflow stages; data from AGBonnet augmented-clinical-notes (dataset idx 58230; conversation and full_note columns).
notes: From (idx:58230) (augmented-clinical-notes). All patient data is fully synthetic — no real patient information.
